name: microesb

metadata.name: microesb
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)
metadata.summary: A Small OOP Based Enterprise Service Bus Implementation.

documentation:
# Python Micro-Enterprise-Service-Bus Module

## 1. Abstract / Preface

*Enterprise Service Bus*, still a pretty vague term. Invented by the Gartner-Report 2002.

Essential for a large SOA-Infrastructure.

## 2. Features

Our interpretation of what a ESB should be made of:

- Service Abstraction / Metadata Definition
- Centralized Service / API Registry containing clean XML, JSON Model
- Centralized Service AAA (Authentication / Authorization / Accounting)
- Internal Service XML / (Python) Class Mapping
- OOP Relational Database Mapper
- Service Model Documentation / API (Auto)-Generation

## 3. Platform As A Service (PaaS)

Also building Web-Applications on PaaS infrastructure relies on a clean Service Abstraction Model.

>[!NOTE]
> Python **micro-esb** module will help.

## 4. Current Implementation

- Service Abstraction / Metadata Definition
- Internal Code (Python) Class / Service XML Mapping
- Graph Based / Recursive JSON Result Abstraction

### 4.1. Working On

- OOP Relational Database Mapper
- Service Documentation (Auto)-Generation

## 5. Documentation / Examples

Documentation including detailed examples can be found at either ./doc or
https://pythondocs.webcodex.de/micro-esb.

documentation: :ivar str _SYSType: const internal system type to differentiate handler types

methods.name: microesb.ClassHandler.__add__
documentation:
overloaded internal \_\_add\_\_() method (+ operator).

```
param dict args

class setup dictionary
```

\_add_class() "wrapper" primary used for ClassMapper.

```pycon
>>> args = {
>>>     'class_name': class_name,
>>>     'class_ref': class_ref
>>> }
>>> parent_instance + args
```

methods.name: microesb.ClassHandler.__iter__
documentation:
overloaded internal __iter__() method.

Overloaded for using iter() on class references.

methods.name: microesb.ClassHandler._add_class
documentation:
_add_class() method.

:param dict *: used for passing params as **args dictionary
:param str class_name: class name
:param classref class_ref: class instance reference

Append class_name to self._SYSClassNames. Setup new class instance
in global namespace.

Primary called by overloaded __add__() method.

methods.name: microesb.ClassHandler.set_properties

foreach item.
